case_title: HOUSEHOLD FINANCE CORPORATION OF CALIFORNIA VS. LINDA ALLSTON et al

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOUSEHOLD FINANCE CORPORATION OF CALIFORNIA ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT ALLSTON, LINDA
